title: Buster Call Over Enies Lobby: Turning Point
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Franky, Luffy, Unknown person #9, Spandam as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Franky, Luffy, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of buster call over enies lobby: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: On the top of the judicial tower...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: What can someone do from that place!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: with this distance and the wind...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Take that shit, bastards!!! Robin-chan, Ruu!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Does he really need to sing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: That sharp- shooter's skill is really amazing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Huh? This Dender-mushi's supposed to belong to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I got it from Nami! Anyway,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They should complete the whole set!!

summary: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Franky, Luffy, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of buster call over enies lobby: turning point.
